_source: Ultimate Campaign p.94-99, CRB p.158 Table 6-9
_note: Each facility maps to the UC room type that provides masterwork artisan's tools for specific Craft sub-skills. The toolBonus field matches the +2 circumstance bonus from masterwork tools (CRB p.92).

facilities.name: Forge
facilities.description: A hearth, anvil, slack tub, and metalworking tools for shaping iron and other metals.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for smithing skills

facilities.name: Artisan's Workshop
facilities.description: A specialist's workshop with tools for a particular art form such as glassworking, gemcutting, or sculpting.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for one Craft skill (chosen when built)

facilities.name: Leather Workshop
facilities.description: A sturdy table, stool, vats, drying racks, and tools for turning raw hides into leather.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for leatherworking skills

facilities.name: Alchemy Lab
facilities.description: A room equipped for Craft (alchemy) checks, researching formulae, and performing alchemical tasks.

facilities.name: Clockwork Shop
facilities.description: A workshop with precision tools and workstations for creating delicate clockwork goods.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for Craft (clockwork)

facilities.name: Siege Workshop
facilities.description: A large workspace for constructing and repairing siege weapons and other large war machines.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for Craft (siege engines)

facilities.name: Bowyer's Workshop
facilities.description: A specialist workshop set up for crafting bows, crossbows, and arrows.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for Craft (bows)

facilities.name: Trap Workshop
facilities.description: A specialist workshop set up for crafting mechanical traps.
facilities.toolBonusNote: Counts as masterwork artisan's tools for Craft (traps)

personalTools._note: CRB Table 6-9. Equipment a PC can carry to gain tool bonuses without a fixed location.

artisansTools.note: Required for crafting; without them use improvised (-2)
